title: MAC commissioned to review salary requirements and the new TSL
body: "The Home Secretary has written to Professor Bell, the Chair of the Migration Advisory Committee (MAC), to commission 2 reviews.  These are:   a review of salary requirements for work visas a review of the new temporary shortage list (TSL)   For the salaries review, the MAC is asked to report within 6 months.  For the TSL review, the MAC is asked to report on the first stage within 6 months and on the second stage within 12 months. "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
